findings.description: PascalCase class names `SqlResultSet` and `SqlRow` appear in the 検索結果表示Action code example in s2 but are absent from the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `SqlResultSet result = searchUser(request, context);` and `SqlRow row = result.get(i);` in the 検索結果表示Actionコード例
